message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in assign_helpers and var_hoisting

Long-term fix: Made valueContainsName and exprContainsNameNode
comprehensive for all expression types.

assign_helpers.zig valueContainsName added:
- boolop, compare, if_expr, dict
- fstring, listcomp, dictcomp, genexp
- lambda, keyword_args, starred

var_hoisting.zig exprContainsNameNode added:
- boolop, compare, subscript slice ranges
- if_expr, list, tuple, dict
- fstring, listcomp, dictcomp, genexp
- lambda, keyword_args, starred

This ensures self-referencing assignment detection and variable
hoisting work correctly with complex expressions.
